title: Exponential concentration for quantum periods via mirror symmetry
author_string: Jingwei Lu, Hua-Zhong Ke, Jianxun Hu
abstract: We investigate power series satisfying the exponential concentration property, and show that suitable modifications of hypergeometric series respect this property. As a geometric application, we prove that the quantum period of a Fano manifold possesses the same property, whenever the manifold admits a convenient weak Landau-Ginzburg model with non-negative coefficients.
